title: Water volumes calculation output
description: Computed volumes for each stage of the brew. All values in liters.

sparge_water_l.description: Sparge water volume. Negative values indicate the mash thickness is too high to reach pre-boil volume from sparge alone — caller should warn the user.

pre_boil_volume_l.description: Wort volume in the kettle at the start of the boil (hot).

post_boil_volume_l.description: Wort volume in the kettle at the end of the boil (hot, before cooling).

post_cool_kettle_volume_l.description: Wort volume in the kettle after cooling, before transfer to fermenter.

grain_absorption_l.description: Liters absorbed by the grain bed (lost to the spent grains).
